highlights_headline: Servicing work on the 3.119 line, restoring WinUI Projection loading for .NET 9 consumers.

bullets.detail: Fixes a DLL-not-found error that stopped .NET 9 consumers of the WinUI projection assembly from starting.
Refreshes the 3.119.x pipeline for ANGLE, the WASM 2.0.6 workload, the current Tizen SDK and the newer Alpine base image so servicing builds keep flowing.
